name: Carbon & Cashmere
description: Crypto trading intelligence API with 49 x402-paid endpoints. Own Bitcoin, Ethereum, Kaspa, and Bittensor nodes. ML ensemble predictions, funding rate analysis, mempool analytics, regime detection, and BTC RPC proxy. 4-chain USDC payments (Base, Solana, Algorand, Stellar). MCP server with 22 tools for AI agents.
